title: Trump-backed World Liberty Financial nears OCC approval for federal trust charter
message_html: Trump-backed World Liberty Financial nears OCC approval for federal trust charter ...
snippet: The federal trust bank charter grant would allow World Liberty to issue and redeem its USD1 stablecoin under a single federal regulator.
